description_long: This chair features a striking, modern design constructed from a series of parallel, curved wooden slats that form the seat, backrest, and armrests. The slats are evenly spaced, creating a visually open and airy structure while maintaining strength and support. The seat gently curves downward in the center, providing ergonomic comfort, and the armrests are integrated into the frame, following the same flowing lines. The backrest is formed by the upper sections of the slats, offering support while maintaining the chair's open aesthetic. The legs are formed by the vertical continuation of the slats, giving the chair a boxy, geometric profile. The overall finish is a rich, dark wood tone, emphasizing the natural grain and texture of the material.
description: A modern chair made of curved, parallel wooden slats with integrated armrests and backrest, finished in a dark wood tone. The open, geometric design provides both visual lightness and ergonomic support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slat design, curved seat, and integrated armrests and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle seat curve and the continuous flow of the slats forming the armrests and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical alignment of the slats and the open backrest structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the seat's curvature and the armrest's integration.
